title: lepechinia salviifolia var. salviifolia
intro: Lepechinia salviifolia var. salviifolia, also known as Mountain Sage, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Lepechinia salviifolia var. salviifolia include relieving cold and flu symptoms, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of Mountain Sage can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
